bodyText:
What is company registration consultant? Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA filing support.
Company Registration Consultant is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Ladakh, Ladakh since 2012.
Quick Answer: Company Registration in Ladakh — Expert company registration consultant — Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Nidhi Company. End-to-end MCA. From ₹5,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Registration Consultant in Ladakh
Virtual Auditor provides company registration consultant across Ladakh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Ladakh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Jammu handles company registrations and filings for Ladakh. Stamp duty: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

• Private Limited Company Registration
• LLP Registration
• One Person Company (OPC)

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Ladakh
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your company registration is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which entity type is best for my business?
faqs.a: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest company to register?
faqs.a: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

faqs.q: Can NRIs register a company in India?
faqs.a: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

faqs.q: Do you provide company registration services in Ladakh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Ladakh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Ladakh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Ladakh fall under ROC Jammu. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Ladakh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Ladakh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Ladakh: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
